Package
Description
org.springframework.data.jdbc.repository.query
Query derivation mechanism for JDBC specific repositories.
org.springframework.data.relational.core.dialect
Dialects abstract the SQL dialect of the underlying database.
org.springframework.data.relational.core.query
Query and update support.

    Subinterfaces with type arguments of type Escaper in org.springframework.data.relational.core.query
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ValueFunction<T extends @Nullable Object>
    Represents a value function to return arbitrary values that can be escaped before returning the actual value.
    Methods in org.springframework.data.relational.core.query with parameters of type Escaper
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    T
    ValueFunction.apply(Escaper escaper)
    Produces a value by considering the given Escaper.
    default Supplier<T>
    ValueFunction.toSupplier(Escaper escaper)
    Adapts this value factory into a Supplier by using the given Escaper.
